1.name: §g§lSnake Stance
1.description:
§6Click Combo: §dRIGHT§7-§dLEFT§7-§dRIGHT

§7Enter the §bSnake Stance §2🐍§7, empowering
§7your next §f3§7 §nMain Attacks§7 to deal significantly
§7more damage.

§7You may only be in one §bStance§7 at a time.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f40
§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f+200% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: +160%)
   §8(§2✤§8 Earth: +40%)

2.name: §g§lLeopard Stance
2.description:
§6Click Combo: §dRIGHT§7-§dRIGHT§7-§dRIGHT

§7Enter the §bLeopard Stance §6🐾§7, empowering
§7your next §f3§7 §nMain Attacks§7 to launch you
§7forwards and deal damage to the first
§7enemy hit. §8(Distance scales with Walk Speed)§7

§7You may only be in one §bStance§7 at a time.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f40
§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f+120% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: +100%)
   §8(§f❋§8 Air: +20%)

3.name: §g§lTiger Stance
3.description:
§6Click Combo: §dRIGHT§7-§dLEFT§7-§dLEFT

§7Enter the §bTiger Stance §c🐯§7, empowering
§7your next §f3§7 §nMain Attacks§7 to deal damage
to all enemies around the struck target.

§7You may only be in one §bStance§7 at a time.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f40
§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f120% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: 100%)
   §8(§c✹§8 Fire: 20%)
§3☀§7 Radius: §f4.5 Blocks

4.name: §g§lCrane Stance
4.description:
§6Click Combo: §dRIGHT§7-§dRIGHT§7-§dLEFT

§7Enter the §bCrane Stance §3🦩§7, empowering
§7your next §f3§7 §nMain Attacks§7 to weaken
enemies.

§7You may only be in one §bStance§7 at a time.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f40
§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f+120% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: +100%)
   §8(§e✦§8 Thunder: +20%)
§e✧§7 Effect: §f-10%§7 Damage Bonus (§c⚔§7) to Enemies
§d⌛§7 Duration: §f8s §8(refreshed per hit)

5.name: §f§lCheaper Snake Stance
5.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nSnake Stance§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-5

6.name: §f§lCheaper Snake Stance
6.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nSnake Stance§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-5

7.name: §f§lCheaper Leopard Stance
7.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nLeopard Stance§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-5

8.name: §f§lCheaper Leopard Stance
8.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nLeopard Stance§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-5

9.name: §f§lEquipment Proficiency
9.description: §7All your positive IDs are boosted by §f+10%§7.

10.name: §h§lFlow of the Dragon
10.description:
§7Upon casting a spell, emit a pulse
§7of energy that deals damage to
§7nearby enemies.

§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f180% §8(Spell Damage)
  §8(§6✣§8 Damage: 150%)
  §8(§b❉§8 Water: 30%)
§3☀§7 Radius: §f4.5 Blocks

11.name: §f§lCheaper Tiger Stance
11.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nTiger Stance§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-5

12.name: §f§lCheaper Tiger Stance
12.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nTiger Stance§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-5

13.name: §f§lCheaper Crane Stance
13.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nCrane Stance§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-5

14.name: §f§lCheaper Crane Stance
14.description:
§7Reduce the mana cost of §nCrane Stance§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-5

15.name: §h§lFootwork
15.description:
§7After casting a spell, you may
§7double-jump to leap forwards.

§d⌛§7 Cast Window: §f1s

16.name: §f§lEarth Affinity
16.description:
§7Convert §f15%§7 of your §nBase Damage§7
into §2✤ Earth§7 damage.

17.name: §f§lFire Affinity
17.description:
§7Convert §f15%§7 of your §nBase Damage§7
into §c✹ Fire§7 damage.

18.name: §f§lThunder Affinity
18.description:
§7Convert §f15%§7 of your §nBase Damage§7
into §e✦ Thunder§7 damage.

19.name: §f§lAir Affinity
19.description:
§7Convert §f15%§7 of your §nBase Damage§7
into §f❋ Air§7 damage.

20.name: §f§lWater Affinity
20.description:
§7Convert §f15%§7 of your §nBase Damage§7
into §b❉ Water§7 damage.

21.name: §k§lDragon Stance
21.description:
§7While in §bSnake Stance §2🐍§7, attempting to change to
a different §bStance §6🐾§c🐯§3🦩§7 will instead §bInvoke§7 it
for your next §nMain Attack§7, costing less mana.
§8(This does not change your current Stance 🐍)

§7The §nMain Attack§7 will benefit from both the effects
of §bSnake Stance §2🐍§7 and the §bInvoked Stance §6🐾§c🐯§3🦩§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f-50%

22.name: §j§lExpanding Strike
22.description:
§7§nDragon Stance§7 improves the size of your
§nMain Attacks§7 based on the §bInvoked Stance §6🐾§c🐯§3🦩§7:

§bInvoked Leopard §6🐾§7: Deal the same damage to all
other enemies around the target struck.

§3☀§7 Radius: §f150% §7Main Attack Range

§bInvoked Tiger §c🐯§7: The attack has a bigger radius.

§3☀§7 Radius: §f+75% §7Main Attack Range

§bInvoked Crane §3🦩§7: The attack damages all nearby
enemies instead.

§3☀§7 Radius: §f150% §7Main Attack Range

23.name: §h§lLegerity
23.description:
§7Casting §nLeopard Stance§7 briefly puts
you in stealth.

§e✧ §7Effect: §fInvisibility§7 to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1s

24.name: §k§lTechnique: Dragon Dance
24.description:
§7After empowering §f3§7 §nMain Attacks§7 with
§bInvoked Stances §6🐾§c🐯§3🦩§7, cast §nSnake Stance§7
to perform a finishing move based on how
many times each §bStance §6🐾§c🐯§3🦩§7 was §bInvoked§7.
§8(This will not put you in Snake Stance 🐍)§7

The first time an enemy is struck, imbue
them with §bYang §f☯§7.

25.name: §g§lClass Description
25.description:
§7§oMastering yourself is true power.§7 The brawler uses
different fighting stances to defeat their enemies in
close-quarters combat. They can use offensive,
defensive, or evasive attacks to adapt in any situation.
Brawlers are adept at both dealing and taking damage,
and can conquer powerful foes on their own.

Weapon: §fNone§7
Main Attack: §fPunch§7 §8(3 Blocks Range ➼)§7
Base Damage: §fHighest §8(tied with Archer and Shaman)§7
Base Resistance: §f120% §8(takes 20% less damage)§7

26.name: §g§lArchetype: Ancient
26.description:
§7Ancients slowly build up damage and
defenses before unleashing it in an
eruptive burst. §8(Setup, Tank)

§7Difficulty: §eMedium
§7Damage: §eMedium
§7Defense: §aHigh
§7Range: §aHigh
§7Speed: §cLow

27.name: §g§lArchetype: Scrapper
27.description:
§7Scrappers overwhelm enemies with
a constant barrage of attacks.
§8(Berserker, Attack Speed)

§7Difficulty: §aEasy
§7Damage: §aHigh
§7Defense: §eMedium
§7Range: §cLow
§7Speed: §eMedium

28.name: §i§lDissonance
28.description:
§7§nDuality§7 now deals its damage in an area.
Overlapping explosions will only deal §c20%§7
damage beyond the first hit (up to 3x).

§7§nDuality§7 deals more damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+100% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +100%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f3 Blocks

29.name: §i§lResonance
29.description:
§7§nDuality§7 erupts into rejuvenating
waves that heal allies over §f1s§7 and
grant you §f+5§7 mana over §f5s§7.

§c❤ §7Total Heal: §f5% §8(Max Health)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f6 Blocks

30.name: §k§lDuality
30.description:
§7§nMain Attacks§7 empowered by §nDragon Stance§7
imbue enemies struck with §bYin §8☯§7, while
§nDragon Techniques§7 imbue enemies struck
with §bYang §f☯§7.

§7If both §bYin §8☯§7 and §bYang §f☯§7 are present on an
enemy, both effects are consumed, dealing
a burst of damage and granting you a short
burst of power.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f200% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 200%)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f+40%§7 Damage Bonus (§a⚔§7) to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

32.name: §3§lDisciplined Force
32.description:
§7§nDormant Force§7 instead triggers after
§f1s§7 of §bInvoking§7 a §bStance§7.

§7§nDormant Force§7 deals less damage and
grants §c-5§7 mana, but will no longer put
you out of your current §bStance §2🐍§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §c-80% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: -70%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: -25%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +15%)

33.name: §j§lDragon Breath
33.description:
§7§nDragon Dance§7 empowers your next §nMain Attack§7
to instead project a powerful blast that
explodes and imbues enemies with §bYin §8☯§7.

Afterwards, you immediately enter §bSnake Stance §2🐍§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f500% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 250%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 50%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 50%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 50%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 50%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 50%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f400% §7Main Attack Range
§3☀ §7Radius: §f150% §7Main Attack Range

34.name: §g§lArchetype: Disciple
34.description:
§7Disciples gracefully shift between
offensive, defensive, and evasive
attacks. §8(Combos, Versatility)

§7Difficulty: §cHard
§7Damage: §eMedium
§7Defense: §eMedium
§7Range: §eMedium
§7Speed: §aHigh

35.name: §h§lAcrobatics
35.description:
§7§nFootwork§7 increases the damage of
your next §nMain Attack§7.

§c⚔§7 Main Attack Damage: §f+30%

36.name: §i§lTechnique: Dragon Sweep
36.description:
§7Upon casting §nCrane Stance§7,
strike all enemies around you,
then draw them in and §bProvoke §4💢§7
them.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f150% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 120%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 30%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f6 Blocks
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

37.name: §h§lSagacity
37.description:
§7Casting §nSnake Stance§7 reduces the
mana costs of your next §f3§7 spells.

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f-3

38.name: §h§lFerocity
38.description:
§7Casting §nTiger Stance§7 temporarily
increases your damage.

§c⚔ §7Raw Damage: §f+50
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f8s

39.name: §k§lDragon Dance (3x Crane)
39.description:
&7Perform a disarming strike that makes
enemies incapable of dealing damage for
a short duration.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f750% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 600%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 150%)
§3☀ §7Radius §f4.5 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effect: §f-100%§7 Damage Bonus (§c⚔§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

40.name: §k§lDragon Dance (2x Crane, 1x Leopard)
40.description:
§7Draw nearby enemies towards you, dealing
damage and heavily slowing them. Then leap
upwards and slow your fall until you land.
§8(Sneak to remove the effect)

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f750% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 600%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 60%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 90%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f6 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effect: §f+80%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f4.5s

41.name: §k§lDragon Dance (2x Crane, 1x Tiger)
41.description:
&7Strike nearby enemies, launching them upwards
and making them more vulnerable to damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f1000% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 800%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 100%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 100%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f6 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effect: §f-15%§7 Resistance (§c✃§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f4.5s

42.name: §k§lDragon Dance (1x Leopard, 1x Tiger, 1x Crane)
42.description:
&7Dash forwards while damaging enemies
around you §f20§7 times and dragging them
with you.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f50% §8(Spell Damage, per hit)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 10%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 10%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 10%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 10%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 10%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f6 Blocks
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1s

43.name: §k§lDragon Dance (3x Leopard)
43.description:
§7Strike nearby enemies with blinding speed,
becoming invisible while rapidly attacking §f30§7
times.

§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f25% §8(Spell Damage, per hit)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: 20%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 5%)
§3☀§7 Radius: §f6 Blocks
§e✧§7 Effects: §fInvisibility§7 to Self
              §f+100%§7 Speed Bonus (§3➲§7) to Self
§d⌛§7 Duration: §f1.5s

44.name: §k§lDragon Dance (2x Leopard, 1x Tiger)
44.description:
§7Teleport forwards, dealing massive damage
to all enemies in your path.

§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f1000% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: 800%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 80%)
   §8(§f❋§8 Air: 120%)
§2➼§7 Range: §f16 Blocks
§3☀§7 Width: §f4.5 Blocks

45.name: §k§lDragon Dance (2x Leopard, 1x Crane)
45.description:
§7Pounce forwards and enter stealth,
then deal damage and blind enemies
around where you land.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f750% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 600%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 60%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 90%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f4.5 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effects: §fBlindness§7 (§c⬣§7) to Enemies
              §fInvisibility§7 to Self
              §f+60%§7 Speed Bonus (§3➲§7) to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f4.5s

46.name: §k§lDragon Dance (3x Tiger)
46.description:
§7Eviscerate enemies in front of you
for massive damage, then make enemies
take the same damage again over §f3s§7.

§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f1000% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: 800%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 200%)
§2➼§7 Range: §f4.5 Blocks
§3☀§7 Angle: §f180°

47.name: §k§lDragon Dance (2x Tiger, 1x Leopard)
47.description:
§7Dash forwards while whirling your claws
around you, dealing damage to enemies §f3§7 times.

§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f500% §8(Spell Damage, per hit)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: 400%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 50%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 50%)
§3☀§7 Radius: §f6 Blocks

48.name: §k§lDragon Dance (2x Tiger, 1x Crane)
48.description:
§7Perform §f2§7 rapid strikes in front of you,
healing you if it hits at least one enemy.

§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f750% §8(Spell Damage, per hit)
   §8(§6✣§8 Damage: 600%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 90%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 60%)
§c❤ §7Total Heal: §f10% §8(Max Health, per strike)
§2➼§7 Range: §f4.5 Blocks
§3☀§7 Angle: §f180°

49.name: §i§lGalvanizing Field
49.description:
§7Casting a spell creates an aura around you
that speeds up allies and damages enemies
every §f0.2s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f30% §8(Spell Damage, every 0.2s)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 25%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 5%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f8 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effects: §f+20%§7 Speed Bonus (§3➲§7) to Allies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f6s

50.name: §k§lCorkian Gumption
50.description:
§7When entering a §bStance§7, instead equip
a §bGauntlet§7 that grants you the same
effects. You may equip up to §f2§7 different
§bGauntlets§7 at once.

Your §nMain Attacks§7 will alternate between
each §bGauntlet§7.

51.name: §j§lOverload
51.description:
§7§nMain Attacks§7 empowered by a §bGauntlet§7
creates an electric chain that jumps
to up to §f6§7 additional enemies beyond the
first, inheriting §c-90%§7 less damage and
copying the full effects of the original hit.
§8(Powerhouse Punch will not be inherited)§7

§2➼ §7Range: §f4.5 Blocks
§d⌛ §7Jump Delay: §f0.1s

52.name: §i§lPowerhouse Punch
52.description:
§7Every second §nMain Attack§7 unleashes
an electric burst around the first
target struck, dealing damage to
surrounding enemies.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f200% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 160%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 20%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 20%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f4.5 Blocks

53.name: §5§lMolten Collapse
53.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lF§7

Cause a massive area around you to melt and
collapse into lava, dealing damage, slowing, and
pulling enemies towards its center every §f0.5s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f250% §8(Spell Damage, every 0.5s)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 150%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 50%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 50%)
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f50% §8(Main Attack Damage, every 0.5s)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 30%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 10%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 10%)
§3☀ §7Radius §f64 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effect: §f+60%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f10s

§3⌚ §7Charge Rate: §fMedium

54.name: §f§lHigher Current
54.description:
§7§nOverload§7 can jump to up to §f+6§7
additional enemies.

55.name: §f§lHigher Voltage
55.description:
§7§nOverload§7 inherits §f+15%§7 more of
the original damage.

56.name: §5§lTwin Dragons
56.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lF§7

Recast the last §nDragon Dance§7 you performed
in the last §f10s§7, for free. §8(You must perform a
Dragon Dance in order to use this ability)§7

You also refill your mana to full.

§3⌚ §7Charge Rate: §fVery Fast

57.name: §i§lAlternating Current
57.description:
§7If §nOverload§7 runs out of enemies,
the electric chain can jump back to
enemies already struck.

58.name: §k§lElectrodynamics
58.description:
§7§nMain Attacks§7 empowered by the §bLeopard Stance §6🐾§7
build up electrical charge and transfer it to
enemies struck, applying §f+12 §bStatic §e⚡§7 (up to 100).
§nOverload§7 will only apply §c-50%§7 of the amount.

Enemies take damage to discharge §c-1 §bStatic §e⚡§7
every §f0.1s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f50% §8(Spell Damage, every 0.1s)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 40%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 10%)

59.name: §5§lElectrostatic Burst
59.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lF§7

After a brief delay, unleash a powerful
electric burst around you. Enemies struck
take massive damage, are stunned, and
instantly gain §f+300 §bStatic §e⚡§7. §8(Static gained
this way can overflow past the max amount,
up to +300)

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f9000% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 7200%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 1800%)
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f1000% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 800%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 200%)
§3☀ §7Radius §f12 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effects: §f-100%§7 Damage Bonus (§c⚔§7) to Enemies
              §f+100%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
              §fBlindness§7 (§c⬣§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f5s

§3⌚ §7Charge Rate: §fMedium

60.name: §h§lPower Surge
60.description:
§7§nPowerhouse Punch§7 allows you to use §nFootwork§7
afterwards.

61.name: §k§lOverdrive
61.description:
§7Direct hits with your §nMain Attack§7 puts you
at §f+10% §bOverdrive §6⏲§7 (up to 100%). For
every §f25% §bOverdrive §6⏲§7 levels you have,
gain §f+1§7 Fixed Attack Speed (up to +3).

Every §f0.2s§7, you have a chance of electrocuting
a random nearby enemy based on your
§bOverdrive §6⏲§7 level. Whenever this triggers,
lose §c-1% §bOverdrive §6⏲§7 and take §c-0.1%§7 of your
Max Health as damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f250% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 200%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 50%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f8 Blocks

62.name: §h§lUpgraded Capacitor
62.description:
§7Gaining a total of §f+50% §bOverdrive §6⏲§7
temporarily prevents your §bOverdrive §6⏲§7
levels from going down.

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f1s

64.name: §i§lDynamic Slide
64.description:
§7§nFootwork§7 leaves behind a trail of §f5§7 sparks
that deal damage to nearby enemies.

If you have §nElectrodynamics§7, each spark
will apply §f+2 §bStatic §e⚡§7 to all enemies struck.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f60% §8(Spell Damage, per spark)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 50%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 10%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f4.5 Blocks

65.name: §h§lShort Circuit
65.description:
§7Whenever an enemy gets electrocuted
with §nOverdrive§7, apply the §bStatic §e⚡§7 effects
from one of your current §bGauntlets§7
chosen at random.

66.name: §j§lSurge Protector
66.description:
§7Taking damage that would reduce your health
to less than §f30%§7 immediately grants a burst
of §f+50% §bOverhealth §6❤§7, decaying over §f10s§7.

§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f300s

68.name: §h§lHeavy Strikes I
68.description:
§7Increase the damage of your
§nMain Attacks§7 by §f+25%§7.

69.name: §f§lCultivation of Spirit
69.description:
§7The damage boost from §nDuality§7
is stronger and lasts longer.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+20%§7 Damage Bonus (§a⚔§7) to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f+1.5s

70.name: §f§lSwift Strikes II
70.description:
§7Increase your Fixed Attack Speed by §f+1§7.

§7Reduce the damage of your §nMain Attacks§7
by §c-50%§7.

71.name: §j§lDormant Force
71.description:
§7Upon entering a §bStance§7, not using your
§nMain Attack§7 for §f1s§7 empowers it to deal
more damage and grant §f+10§7 mana.

This will immediately put you out of your
current §bStance§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+200% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +160%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: +40%)

72.name: §i§lImpact Crater
72.description:
§7§nMain Attacks§7 empowered by §bTiger Stance §c🐯§7
create boiling craters that deal damage
and slow enemies every §f0.5s§7.

You may have up to §f3§7 craters at once.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f50% §8(Spell Damage, every 0.5s)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 35%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 15%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f8 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effect: §f20%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

73.name: §k§lVolcanic Burst
73.description:
§7§nMain Attacks§7 empowered by §bCrane Stance §3🦩§7
grant you §f+20% §bPressure §4🪨§7 (up to 100%).
§bPressure §4🪨§7 decays by §c-1%§7 every §f0.2s§7.

Once you reach §f100% §bPressure §4🪨§7, cause an
eruption around you that deals heavy damage.
Afterwards, lose all §bPressure §4🪨§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f500% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 400%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 50%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 50%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f8 Blocks
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f5s §8(starts after the eruption)

74.name: §j§lMagnitude
74.description:
§7§nVolcanic Burst§7 becomes more powerful for
every §f1s§7 you spend with §f+60% §bPressure §4🪨§7
(up to x10).

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+100% §8(Main Attack Damage, per 1s)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +60%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: +20%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: +20%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f+0.8 Blocks §8(per 1s)

75.name: §i§lVolcanic Fissure
75.description:
§7When empowered by §nDormant Force§7,
§bTiger Stance §c🐯§7 causes all nearby
§nImpact Craters§7 to erupt, dealing damage
to enemies above them and refreshing
their duration.

Increase §nImpact Crater§7's base duration.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f400% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 320%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 40%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 40%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f16 Blocks
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f+7s

77.name: §i§lTectonic Shift
77.description:
§7When empowered by §nDormant Force§7,
§bLeopard Stance §6🐾§7 will no longer have a dash.
Instead, it deals increased damage to all
nearby enemies and launches them in front
of you.

If you are above an §nImpact Crater§7, move it
in front of you.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+80% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +60%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: +40%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: -20%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f250% §7Main Attack Range

78.name: §k§lIchor of Garaheth
78.description:
§7When empowered by §nDormant Force§7,
§bSnake Stance §2🐍§7 causes an explosion
that damages and imbues enemies struck
with §f+3 §bIchor §5⚕§7 (up to 3).

§nFlow of the Dragon§7 consumes §c-1 §bIchor §5⚕§7
from enemies struck, dealing the same
amount of damage and heavily slowing them.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f200% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 160%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 20%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 20%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f8 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effect: §f80%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f2s

79.name: §j§lObsidian Shards
79.description:
§7Whenever you consume §bIchor §5⚕§7 from enemies,
they drop an §bObsidian Shard§7. Picking up an
§bObsidian Shard§7 grants you §f+5% §bOverhealth §6❤§7
(up to 25%), decaying over §f10s§7.

When enemies die with §bIchor §5⚕§7, they drop an
§bObsidian Shard§7.

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f5s

80.name: §j§lEarthquake
80.description:
§7While you have §f+60% §bPressure §4🪨§7, holding
shift will cause the ground around you to
rumble, dealing damage and pulling nearby
enemies and §bObsidian Shards§7 to you every §f0.2s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f50% §8(Spell Damage, every 0.2s)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 40%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 5%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 5%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f10 Blocks

81.name: §i§lAdaptability
81.description:
§7While your health is above §f50%§7,
deal §f+20%§7 more damage.

§7While your health is below §f50%§7,
take §f-20%§7 less damage.

82.name: §k§lPyroclasm
82.description:
§7Once §nVolcanic Burst§7 triggers with at least §f5 §7§nMagnitude§7,
you and all nearby §nImpact Craters§7 will erupt into
a pillar of lava, dealing heavy damage to all enemies
in the area over §f3s§7. For every stack of §nMagnitude§7
you had, this deals §f+10%§7 more damage.

Affected §nImpact Craters§7 will disappear afterwards.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f500% §8(Main Attack Damage, from Volcanic Burst)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 300%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 150%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 50%)

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f1000% §8(Spell Damage, per Impact Crater)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 600%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 100%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 300%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f16 Blocks

83.name: §f§lEminence
83.description:
§7§nFlow of the Dragon§7 deals more damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+80% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +60%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +20%)

84.name: §f§lPresence
84.description:
§7§nFlow of the Dragon§7 increases in size.

§3☀ §7Radius: §f+3.5 Blocks

85.name: §h§lInfluence
85.description: §7§nFlow of the Dragon§7 pulls enemies to you.

86.name: §h§lMaul
86.description:
§7§nMain Attacks§7 empowered by §bTiger Stance §c🐯§7
pull enemies inwards.

§3☀ §7Radius: §f+3.5 Blocks

87.name: §i§lElectromagnetism
87.description:
§7§nOverload§7 gains more range, and pulls
enemies to the previous target.

§7§nOverload§7 inherits §f+15%§7 more damage,
and can jump to up to §f+6§7 additional
enemies.

§2➼ §7Range: §f+1.5 Blocks

88.name: §h§lLimber
88.description:
§7§nFootwork§7 cleanses you of all
negative effects and fire.

89.name: §f§lVital Strikes
89.description:
§7§nMain Attacks§7 empowered by §bSnake Stance §2🐍§7
deal more damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+30% §8(Main Attack Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +30%)

90.name: §f§lDisabling Strikes
90.description:
§7§nMain Attacks§7 empowered by §bCrane Stance §3🦩§7
further cripple enemies.

§e✧§7 Effects: §f-10%§7 Damage Bonus (§c⚔§7) to Enemies
              §f+40%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies

91.name: §f§lMagma Chamber
91.description:
§7§nMagnitude§7 stores more damage every §f1s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+50% §8(Main Attack Damage, per 1s)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +40%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: +10%)

92.name: §j§lEnergy of the Universe
92.description:
§7For every §f1§7 block you travel,
gain §f+1§7 mana.

93.name: §h§lCaldera
93.description:
§7§nVolcanic Fissure§7 also expands the size
of affected §nImpact Craters§7.

§3☀ §7Radius: §f+4 Blocks §8(up to +8 Blocks)

94.name: §f§lEphemerality
94.description:
§7Gain §f+12%§7 dodge chance, but
take §c+5%§7 more damage.

95.name: §h§lObsidian Scales
95.description:
§7Taking damage with §f+60% §bPressure §4🪨§7
will drop an §bObsidian Shard§7 nearby.

§2➼ §7Range: §f8 Blocks
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f1s

96.name: §h§lMagma Armor
96.description:
§7Reduce all damage you take by §f25%§7 of
your §bPressure §4🪨§7.

While you have §f+60% §bPressure §4🪨§7, you
are immune to knockback.

97.name: §f§lHeavy Strikes II
97.description:
§7Decrease your Fixed Attack Speed by §c-1§7.

§7Increase the damage of your §nMain Attacks§7
by §f+50%§7.

98.name: §h§lTranquility
98.description:
§7Casting §nCrane Stance§7 briefly grants
resistance.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+40%§7 Resistance (§a❁§7) to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1.5s

99.name: §j§lStatic Discharge
99.description:
§7Your §nMain Attacks§7 can consume §bStatic §e⚡§7 on enemies
for a different effect based on the §bGauntlet§7 used:

§bTiger Gauntlet §c🐯§7: Instantly discharge §c-2 §bStatic §e⚡§7
without dealing its damage, reducing resistances
instead (up to §f15x§7).

§e✧ §7Effect: §f-1%§7 Resistance Bonus (§c✃§7) to Enemies, per stack
§d⌛§7 Duration: §f6s §8(refreshed per stack)

§bCrane Gauntlet §3🦩§7: Instantly discharge §c-2 §bStatic §e⚡§7
without dealing its damage, healing you instead.

§c❤ §7Total Heal: §f1% §8(Max Health)

§7§nOverload§7 will copy these effects with §c-50%§7 efficacy.

100.name: §h§lAdaptive Hardware
100.description:
§7Your §bSnake Gauntlet §2🐍§7 will randomly copy
the §bStatic §e⚡§7 effects of a §bGauntlet§7 you are
not wearing.

You may apply up to §f+100§7 §bStatic §e⚡§7 on enemies.

101.name: §f§lEternity
101.description:
§7Your Health Regen and Mana Regen
tick §f+20%§7 faster.

103.name: §3§lDouble-Assault Battering
103.description:
§7While wearing the §bSnake Gauntlet §2🐍§7, your
other equipped §bGauntlet§7 can only be used
for §f1 §7§nMain Attack§7.

Your §nMain Attacks§7 will instead strike with
both §bGauntlets§7 at the same time, and will
trigger the effects of both §nDragon Stance§7
and §nPowerhouse Punch§7.

§nPowerhouse Punch§7 deals less damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §c-80% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: -70%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: -5%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +15%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: -20%)

104.name: §h§lStatic Field
104.description:
§7§nGalvanizing Field§7 applies §f+1 §bStatic §e⚡§7 to
enemies per hit.

105.name: §g§lWeapon
105.description:
§7You cannot use any weapons.

Your Base Damage increases from your
level (§6✣§7) and your skill points (§2✤§e✦§b❉§c✹§f❋§7).

You have an initial §oFixed Attack Speed§7
of §fVery Slow§7. Life Steal, Mana Steal, and
Powder Special charge rate are based
on your §oFixed Attack Speed§7.

Attack Speed Tier will instead increase
or decrease your Main Attack Damage,
up to a limit.

106.name: §f§lDormancy
106.description:
§7Increase your maximum §bPressure §4🪨§7 by §f+20%§7.

§nVolcanic Strike§7 now erupts at §f120% §bPressure §4🪨§7.

107.name: §h§lHephaestus' Temper
107.description:
§7While you have §f+60% §bPressure §4🪨§7, getting
hit for less than §f10%§7 of your Max Health
accelerates §nMagnitude§7 build-up by §f+1s§7.

§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f3s

108.name: §i§lObsidian Fracture
108.description:
§7Whenever an §bObsidian Shard§7 gets picked up
or expires, it creates a fiery explosion that
damages nearby enemies and grants nearby
allies §f+5% §bOverhealth §6❤§7 (up to 10%) that decays
over §f10s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f200% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 160%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 40%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f12 Blocks

109.name: §h§lMight of the Colossus
109.description:
§7All of your abilities gain §f+15% §3☀ §7Radius, 
and all damage you deal slows enemies.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f20%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1s

111.name: §i§lTechnique: Dragon Rise
111.description:
§7Upon casting §nLeopard Stance§7,
strike nearby enemies and
leap upwards.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f150% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 120%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 30%)
§3☀ §7Radius: §f6 Blocks

112.name: §i§lTechnique: Dragon Claw
112.description:
§7Upon casting §nTiger Stance§7,
visciously strike enemies in front
of you.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f240% §8(Spell Damage)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 180%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 30%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 30%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f4.5 Blocks
§3☀ §7Angle: §f180°

113.name: §i§lSwaying Motion
113.description:
§7Casting a spell while a §bStance§7 is active
grants you a brief resistance bonus
and causes you to counterattack against
all hits you take.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f60% §8(Spell Damage, per hit)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 45%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 15%)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f+20%§7 Resistance Bonus (§a❁§7) to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f1s
